allow: Bash(node -e "const {Client} = require\(''pg''\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:''postgresql://rehearse:rehearse@localhost:5432/rehearse''}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=\\''public\\''''\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\);}\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''ERROR:'',e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {Client} = require\(''pg''\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:''postgresql://rehearse:rehearse@localhost:5432/rehearse''}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=\\''users\\'' ORDER BY ordinal_position''\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.column_name\).join\('', ''\)\);c.end\(\);}\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''ERROR:'',e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {Client} = require\(''pg''\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:''postgresql://rehearse:rehearse@localhost:5432/rehearse''}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=\\''sessions\\'' ORDER BY ordinal_position''\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.column_name\).join\('', ''\)\);c.end\(\);}\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''ERROR:'',e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {Client} = require\(''pg''\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:''postgresql://rehearse:rehearse@localhost:5432/rehearse''}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT id, email, ""onboardingCompleted"" FROM users LIMIT 10''\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\);}\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''ERROR:'',e.message\)\);")
